title: Танталовы муки — про «завтра»
style: Flat minimalist vector mascot style, same character design, proportions, dark teal background and warm palette as the reference image(s). Vertical 9:16, full body, centered, no text, clean bold shapes.

scenes.image: the mortal youth standing in water reaching up toward a glowing golden fruit hanging on a branch just above him, his little flame creature burning beside him
scenes.motion: the mortal stretches upward, the fruit sways slightly, the flame flickers
scenes.vo: Твоя цель — на расстоянии вытянутой руки.
scenes.caption: Цель — на расстоянии руки

scenes.image: the mortal reaching for the fruit but it pulls away out of reach, he shrugs saying maybe tomorrow, looking tired, his little flame creature getting smaller and dimmer
scenes.motion: the fruit drifts away each time he reaches, the mortal shrugs, the flame dims
scenes.vo: Но ты говоришь «завтра». И плод ускользает. Снова и снова.
scenes.caption: «Завтра» — и плод ускользает

scenes.image: Ares the stern muscular war god in armor points commandingly at the fruit, fierce expression, ordering the mortal to take it now
scenes.motion: Ares jabs his finger toward the fruit decisively, the mortal straightens up
scenes.vo: Арес рычит: «Завтра — это никогда. Возьми. Сегодня».
scenes.caption: «Завтра — это никогда»

scenes.image: the mortal firmly grabs the golden fruit with both hands now, triumphant determined expression, his little flame creature flaring up big and bright
scenes.motion: the mortal seizes the fruit, the flame flares up bright with sparks
scenes.vo: Схватил сейчас — и плод в руке. Бери сегодня.
scenes.caption: Бери СЕГОДНЯ
